# KediSmart

> KediSmart (also known as Kedi Smart, kedismart, Kedi_Smart, Kedi-Smart) is Bangladesh's pet & animal marketplace — shop products, browse live animal listings, find vets, read care guides, and protect pets with NFC smart tags for digital pet identification and lost-pet recovery.

KediSmart is an online platform at https://kedismart.com serving pet owners, breeders, sellers, and veterinarians across Bangladesh.

## Brand names

- KediSmart (canonical)
- Kedi Smart
- kedismart
- Kedi_Smart
- Kedi-Smart

## Leadership

- CEO: Jahura Satter — https://kedismart.com/authors/jahura-satter
- HQ: A.B.M Tower, Gulshan 2, Dhaka 1212, Bangladesh
- Phone: +880 1898-941782
- Email: info@kedismart.com

## Primary destinations

- [Home](https://kedismart.com/): Platform overview
- [About](https://kedismart.com/about): Company, mission, E-E-A-T
- [Contact](https://kedismart.com/contact): NAP, map, support
- [FAQ](https://kedismart.com/faq): Help center
- [Privacy](https://kedismart.com/privacy): Privacy policy
- [Terms](https://kedismart.com/terms): Terms of service
- [Shipping](https://kedismart.com/shipping): Delivery across Bangladesh
- [Returns](https://kedismart.com/returns): Returns & refunds
- [Editorial Policy](https://kedismart.com/editorial-policy): Content standards
- [Press](https://kedismart.com/press): Media kit
- [Live Animals Marketplace](https://kedismart.com/marketplace): Buy, sell, and adopt pets
- [Shop](https://kedismart.com/shop): Pet care and general products
- [Vets](https://kedismart.com/vets): Veterinary clinics and professionals
- [Smart Tags](https://kedismart.com/tags): NFC / QR pet identification
- [Knowledge Base](https://kedismart.com/learn): Topic clusters
- [Guides](https://kedismart.com/guides): Evergreen explainers
- [Compare](https://kedismart.com/compare): NFC vs QR, NFC vs microchip, and more
- [Emergency Center](https://kedismart.com/emergency): Lost pet recovery steps
- [Pet Care Topics](https://kedismart.com/pets): Knowledge hub by animal category
- [Blog](https://kedismart.com/blog): Tips, stories, and community updates
- [Resources / Roadmap](https://kedismart.com/resources): Editorial plan
- [HTML Sitemap](https://kedismart.com/site-map): Human site map
- [Blog RSS](https://kedismart.com/blog/feed.xml): Syndicate latest posts
- [Sitemap](https://kedismart.com/sitemap.xml): Full public URL map

## Core entities (for AI citation)

- NFC pet tag: wearable digital ID opened by phone tap
- Digital pet ID: privacy-controlled online profile for recovery and care notes
- Lost pet recovery: search + finder contact via smart tag lost mode
- Layered identification: collar tag + NFC/QR + microchip

## Product URL pattern

- Clean slug URLs: https://kedismart.com/product/{slug}
- Alias redirect: /products/{slug} → /product/{slug}

## Optional

- [humans.txt](https://kedismart.com/humans.txt): Credits
- [security.txt](https://kedismart.com/.well-known/security.txt): Security contact
